sources.name: USGS Mineral Commodity Summaries
sources.detail: Latest official annual edition detected: 2026. Structured mineral values are not estimated from the PDF.

records.name: Mineral Commodity Summaries 2026
records.detail: Annual government summary covering domestic industry, government programs, tariffs and five-year salient statistics for more than 90 minerals and materials.

methodology.observations: Each agency keeps its own observation period, collection time, cadence and failure state.
methodology.retention: A temporary source failure retains previously verified records as stale; it never silently replaces populated history with an empty result.
methodology.keys: EIA, BEA and Census use free API keys stored only in GitHub Actions Secrets. BLS can run without a key; SEC and USGS require no key.
methodology.consensus: No market consensus estimates are created by these official feeds.
methodology.censusCodes: Census records preserve official data-type and category codes until a verified dictionary join is available.
methodology.usgs: USGS integration tracks the official annual release and does not OCR or estimate values from PDF tables.
